  }

  /* Primary variant */

rounded-r-xl border px-3 border-gray-200 aspect-square dark:border-white/[0.07] bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark hover:bg-gray-600/5 dark:hover:bg-gray-200/5" aria-label="More actions" type="button" id="radix-_R_2shmav5tj9rqaabsnpfdb_" aria-haspopup="menu" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed"><svg width="8" height="24" viewBox="0 -9 3 24" class="transition-transform stroke-linecap="round"></path></svg></button></div></div></div><div class="mt-2 text-lg prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert [&amp;&gt;*]:[overflow-wrap:anywhere]"><p>Learn how to connect Claude Code to your tools with the Model Context Protocol.</p></div><div id="page-context-menu" class="flex items-center shrink-0 min-w-[156px] mt-3 sm:hidden"><button id="page-context-menu-button" class="rounded-l-xl px-3 text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 py-1.5 border border-gray-200 dark:border-white/[0.07] bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark hover:bg-gray-600/5 dark:hover:bg-gray-200/5 border-r-0" aria-label="Copy page"><div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-center font-medium"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="w-4 h-4"><path d="M14.25 5.25H7.25C6.14543 5.25 5.25 6.14543 5.25 7.25V14.25C5.25 15.3546 6.14543 16.25 7.25 16.25H14.25C15.3546 16.25 16.25 15.3546 16.25 stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg><span>Copy page</span></div></button><button class="group disabled:pointer-events-none [&amp;&gt;span]:line-clamp-1 overflow-hidden group flex items-center py-0.5 gap-1 text-sm text-gray-950/50 dark:text-white/50 group-hover:text-gray-950/70 dark:group-hover:text-white/70 rounded-none rounded-r-xl border px-3 border-gray-200 aspect-square dark:border-white/[0.07] bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark hover:bg-gray-600/5 dark:hover:bg-gray-200/5" aria-label="More actions" type="button" id="radix-_R_5hmav5tj9rqaabsnpfdb_" aria-haspopup="menu" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed"><svg width="8" height="24" viewBox="0 -9 3 24" class="transition-transform text-gray-400 overflow-visible group-hover:text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-600 dark:group-hover:text-gray-400 rotate-90"><path d="M0 0L3 3L0 6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"></path></svg></button></div></header><div class="mdx-content relative mt-8 mb-14 prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert [contain:inline-size] isolate" data-page-title="Connect Claude Code to tools via MCP" data-page-href="/en/mcp" id="content"><span data-as="p">Claude Code can connect to hundreds of external tools and data sources through the <a href="https://modelcontextprotocol.io/introduction" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" class="link">Model Context Protocol (MCP)</a>, an open source standard for AI-tool integrations. MCP servers give Claude Code access to your tools, databases, and APIs.</span>
<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="what-you-can-do-with-mcp"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#what-you-can-do-with-mcp" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">What you can do with MCP</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">With MCP servers connected, you can ask Claude Code to:</span>
<ul>
<li><strong>Implement features from issue trackers</strong>: “Add the feature described in JIRA issue ENG-4521 and create a PR on GitHub.”</li>
<li><strong>Analyze monitoring data</strong>: “Check Sentry and Statsig to check the usage of the feature described in ENG-4521.”</li>
<li><strong>Query databases</strong>: “Find emails of 10 random users who used feature ENG-4521, based on our PostgreSQL database.”</li>
<li><strong>Integrate designs</strong>: “Update our standard email template based on the new Figma designs that were posted in Slack”</li>
<li><strong>Automate workflows</strong>: “Create Gmail drafts inviting these 10 users to a feedback session about the new feature.”</li>
</ul>
<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="popular-mcp-servers"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#popular-mcp-servers" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Popular MCP servers</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">Here are some commonly used MCP servers you can connect to Claude Code:</span>
<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50 dark:border-yellow-900 dark:bg-yellow-600/20 [&amp;_[data-component-part=&#x27;callout-icon&#x27;]]:mt-px" data-callout-type="warning"><div class="mt-0.5 w-4" data-component-part="callout-icon"><svg class="flex-none size-5 text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-label="Warning"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 9v2m0 4h.01m-6.938 4h13.856c1.54 0 2.502-1.667 1.732-3L13.732 4c-.77-1.333-2.694-1.333-3.464 0L3.34 16c-.77 1.333.192 3 1.732 3z"></path></svg></div><div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&amp;_code]:!text-current [&amp;_kbd]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:border-current [&amp;_strong]:!text-current text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300" data-component-part="callout-content"><span data-as="p">Use third party MCP servers at your own risk - Anthropic has not verified
the correctness or security of all these servers.
Make sure you trust MCP servers you are installing.
Be especially careful when using MCP servers that could fetch untrusted
content, as these can expose you to prompt injection risk.</span></div></div>
<!-- -->
<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20" data-callout-type="note"><div class="mt-0.5 w-4" data-component-part="callout-icon"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" aria-label="Note"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M7 1.3C10.14 1.3 12.7 3.86 12.7 7C12.7 10.14 10.14 12.7 7 12.7C5.48908 12.6974 4.0408 12.096 2.97241 11.0276C1.90403 9.9592 1.30264 8.51092 1.3 7C1.3 3.86 3.86 1.3 7 1.3ZM7 0C3.14 0 0 3.14 0 7C0 10.86 3.14 14 7 14C10.86 14 14 10.86 14 7C14 3.14 10.86 0 7 0ZM8 3H6V8H8V3ZM8 9H6V11H8V9Z"></path></svg></div><div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&amp;_code]:!text-current [&amp;_kbd]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:border-current [&amp;_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" data-component-part="callout-content"><span data-as="p"><strong>Need a specific integration?</strong> <a href="https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" class="link">Find hundreds more MCP servers on GitHub</a>, or build your own using the <a href="https://modelcontextprotocol.io/quickstart/server" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" class="link">MCP SDK</a>.</span></div></div>
<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="installing-mcp-servers"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#installing-mcp-servers" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Installing MCP servers</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">MCP servers can be configured in three different ways depending on your needs:</span>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="option-1-add-a-remote-http-server"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#option-1-add-a-remote-http-server" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Option 1: Add a remote HTTP server</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">HTTP servers are the recommended option for connecting to remote MCP servers. This is the most widely supported transport for cloud-based services.</span>
<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark-plus" style="background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E;color:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4" language="shellscript"><code language="shellscript" numberOfLines="9"><span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Basic syntax</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">claude</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> mcp</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> add</span><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6"> --transport</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> http</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4"> &lt;</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">nam</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">e</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">&gt;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4"> &lt;</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">ur</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">l</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">&gt;</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Real example: Connect to Notion</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">claude</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> mcp</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> add</span><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6"> --transport</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> http</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> notion</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> https://mcp.notion.com/mcp</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Example with Bearer token</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">claude</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> mcp</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> add</span><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6"> --transport</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> http</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> secure-api</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> https://api.example.com/mcp</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  --header</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;Authorization: Bearer your-token&quot;</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div><div data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="option-2-add-a-remote-sse-server"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#option-2-add-a-remote-sse-server" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Option 2: Add a remote SSE server</span></h3>
<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50 dark:border-yellow-900 dark:bg-yellow-600/20 [&amp;_[data-component-part=&#x27;callout-icon&#x27;]]:mt-px" data-callout-type="warning"><div class="mt-0.5 w-4" data-component-part="callout-icon"><svg class="flex-none size-5 text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-label="Warning"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 9v2m0 4h.01m-6.938 4h13.856c1.54 0 2.502-1.667 1.732-3L13.732 4c-.77-1.333-2.694-1.333-3.464 0L3.34 16c-.77 1.333.192 3 1.732 3z"></path></svg></div><div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&amp;_code]:!text-current [&amp;_kbd]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:border-current [&amp;_strong]:!text-current text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300" data-component-part="callout-content"><span data-as="p">The SSE (Server-Sent Events) transport is deprecated. Use HTTP servers instead, where available.</span></div></div>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">claude</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> mcp</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> add</span><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6"> --transport</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> sse</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4"> &lt;</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">nam</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">e</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">&gt;</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4"> &lt;</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">ur</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">l</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">&gt;</span></span>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Real example: Connect to Asana</span></span>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Example with authentication header</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">claude</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> mcp</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> add</span><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6"> --transport</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> sse</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> private-api</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> https://api.company.com/sse</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  --header</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;X-API-Key: your-key-here&quot;</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div><div data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="option-3-add-a-local-stdio-server"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#option-3-add-a-local-stdio-server" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Option 3: Add a local stdio server</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">Stdio servers run as local processes on your machine. They’re ideal for tools that need direct system access or custom scripts.</span>
<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark-plus" style="background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E;color:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4" language="shellscript"><code language="shellscript" numberOfLines="6"><span class="line"><span <span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">claude</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> mcp</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> add</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4"> [options] </span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">&lt;</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">name</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">&gt;</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4"> -- </span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">&lt;</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">command</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">&gt;</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4"> [args...]</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Real example: Add Airtable server</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">claude</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> mcp</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> add</span><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6"> --transport</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> stdio</span><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6"> --env</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> AIRTABLE_API_KEY=YOUR_KEY</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> airtable</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D7BA7D"> \</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">  --</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> npx</span><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6"> -y</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> airtable-mcp-server</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div><div data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div>
<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20" data-callout-type="note"><div class="mt-0.5 w-4" data-component-part="callout-icon"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" aria-label="Note"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M7 1.3C10.14 1.3 12.7 3.86 12.7 7C12.7 10.14 10.14 12.7 7 12.7C5.48908 12.6974 4.0408 12.096 2.97241 11.0276C1.90403 9.9592 1.30264 8.51092 1.3 7C1.3 3.86 3.86 1.3 7 1.3ZM7 0C3.14 0 0 3.14 0 7C0 10.86 3.14 14 7 14C10.86 14 14 10.86 14 7C14 3.14 10.86 0 7 0ZM8 3H6V8H8V3ZM8 9H6V11H8V9Z"></path></svg></div><div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&amp;_code]:!text-current [&amp;_kbd]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:border-current [&amp;_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" data-component-part="callout-content"><span data-as="p"><strong>Important: Option ordering</strong></span><span data-as="p">All options (<code>--transport</code>, <code>--env</code>, <code>--scope</code>, <code>--header</code>) must come <strong>before</strong> the server name. The <code>--</code> (double dash) then separates the server name from the command and arguments that get passed to the MCP server.</span><span data-as="p">For example:</span><ul>
<li><code>claude mcp add --transport stdio myserver -- npx server</code> → runs <code>npx server</code></li>
<li><code>claude mcp add --transport stdio --env KEY=value myserver -- python server.py --port 8080</code> → runs <code>python server.py --port 8080</code> with <code>KEY=value</code> in environment</li>
</ul><span data-as="p">This prevents conflicts between Claude’s flags and the server’s flags.</span></div></div>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="managing-your-servers"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#managing-your-servers" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Managing your servers</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">Once configured, you can manage your MCP servers with these commands:</span>
<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent [&amp;_*]:outline-0 [&amp;_*]:focus:ring-0 [&amp;_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark-plus" style="background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E;color:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4" language="shellscript"><code language="shellscript" numberOfLines="11"><span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># List all configured servers</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">claude</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> mcp</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> list</span></span>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Get details for a specific server</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">claude</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> mcp</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> get</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> github</span></span>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Remove a server</span></span>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">/mcp</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div><div data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="dynamic-tool-updates"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#dynamic-tool-updates" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Dynamic tool updates</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">Claude Code supports MCP <code>list_changed</code> notifications, allowing MCP servers to dynamically update their available tools, prompts, and resources without requiring you to disconnect and reconnect. When an MCP server sends a <code>list_changed</code> notification, Claude Code automatically refreshes the available capabilities from that server.</span>
<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-green-200 bg-green-50 dark:border-green-900 dark:bg-green-600/20 [&amp;_[data-component-part=&#x27;callout-icon&#x27;]]:mt-px" data-callout-type="tip"><div class="mt-0.5 w-4" data-component-part="callout-icon"><svg width="11" height="14" viewBox="0 0 11 14" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="text-green-800 dark:text-green-300 w-3.5 h-auto" aria-label="Tip"><path d="M3.12794 12.4232C3.12794 12.5954 3.1776 12.7634 3.27244 12.907L3.74114 13.6095C3.88471 13.8248 4.21067 14 4.46964 14H6.15606C6.41415 14 6.74017 13.825 6.88373 13.6095L7.3508 12.9073C7.43114 12.7859 7.49705 12.569 7.49705 12.4232L7.50055 11.3513H3.12521L3.12794 12.4232ZM5.31288 0C2.52414 0.00875889 0.5 2.26889 0.5 4.78826C0.5 6.00188 0.949566 7.10829 1.69119 7.95492C2.14321 8.47011 2.84901 9.54727 3.11919 10.4557C3.12005 10.4625 3.12175 10.4698 3.12261 10.4771H7.50342C7.50427 10.4698 7.50598 10.463 7.50684 10.4557C7.77688 9.54727 8.48281 8.47011 8.93484 7.95492C9.67728 7.13181 10.1258 6.02703 10.1258 4.78826C10.1258 2.15486 7.9709 0.000106649 5.31288 0ZM7.94902 7.11267C7.52078 7.60079 6.99082 8.37878 6.6077 9.18794H4.02051C3.63739 8.37878 3.10743 7.60079 2.67947 7.11294C2.11997 6.47551 1.8126 5.63599 1.8126 4.78826C1.8126 3.09829 3.12794 1.31944 5.28827 1.3126C7.2435 1.3126 8.81315 2.88226 8.81315 4.78826C8.81315 5.63599 8.50688 6.47551 7.94902 7.11267ZM4.87534 2.18767C3.66939 2.18767 2.68767 3.16939 2.68767 4.37534C2.68767 4.61719 2.88336 4.81288 3.12521 4.81288C3.36705 4.81288 3.56274 4.61599 3.56274 4.37534C3.56274 3.6515 4.1515 3.06274 4.87534 3.06274C5.11719 3.06274 5.31288 2.86727 5.31288 2.62548C5.31288 2.38369 5.11599 2.18767 4.87534 2.18767Z"></path></svg></div><div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&amp;_code]:!text-current [&amp;_kbd]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:border-current [&amp;_strong]:!text-current text-green-800 dark:text-green-300" data-component-part="callout-content"><span data-as="p">Tips:</span><ul>
<li>Use the <code>--scope</code> flag to specify where the configuration is stored:<!-- -->
<ul>
<li><code>local</code> (default): Available only to you in the current project (was called <code>project</code> in older versions)</li>
<li><code>project</code>: Shared with everyone in the project via <code>.mcp.json</code> file</li>
<li><code>user</code>: Available to you across all projects (was called <code>global</code> in older versions)</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Set environment variables with <code>--env</code> flags (for example, <code>--env KEY=value</code>)</li>
<li>Configure MCP server startup timeout using the MCP_TIMEOUT environment variable (for example, <code>MCP_TIMEOUT=10000 claude</code> sets a 10-second timeout)</li>
<li>Claude Code will display a warning when MCP tool output exceeds 10,000 tokens. To increase this limit, set the <code>MAX_MCP_OUTPUT_TOKENS</code> environment variable (for example, <code>MAX_MCP_OUTPUT_TOKENS=50000</code>)</li>
<li>Use <code>/mcp</code> to authenticate with remote servers that require OAuth 2.0 authentication</li>
</ul></div></div>
<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50 dark:border-yellow-900 dark:bg-yellow-600/20 code-block-background [&amp;_*]:ring-0 [&amp;_*]:outline-0 [&amp;_*]:focus:ring-0 [&amp;_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25" data-component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0" style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E"><div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6"><pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light-default dark-plus" style="background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E;color:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4" language="shellscript"><code language="shellscript" numberOfLines="2"><span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># This creates command=&quot;cmd&quot; which Windows can execute</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">claude</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> mcp</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> add</span><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6"> --transport</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> stdio</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> my-server</span><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6"> --</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> cmd</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> /c</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> npx</span><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6"> -y</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> @some/package</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div><div data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div><span data-as="p">Without the <code>cmd /c</code> wrapper, you’ll encounter “Connection closed” errors because Windows cannot directly execute <code>npx</code>. (See the note above for an explanation of the <code>--</code> parameter.)</span></div></div>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="plugin-provided-mcp-servers"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#plugin-provided-mcp-servers" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Plugin-provided MCP servers</span></h3>
<span data-as="p"><a class="link" href="/docs/en/plugins">Plugins</a> can bundle MCP servers, automatically providing tools and integrations when the plugin is enabled. Plugin MCP servers work identically to user-configured servers.</span>
<span data-as="p"><strong>How plugin MCP servers work</strong>:</span>
<ul>
<li>Plugins define MCP servers in <code>.mcp.json</code> at the plugin root or inline in <code>plugin.json</code></li>
<li>When a plugin is enabled, its MCP servers start automatically</li>
<li>Plugin MCP tools appear alongside manually configured MCP tools</li>
<li>Plugin servers are managed through plugin installation (not <code>/mcp</code> commands)</li>
</ul>
<span data-as="p"><strong>Example plugin MCP configuration</strong>:</span>
<span data-as="p">In <code>.mcp.json</code> at plugin root:</span>
<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent </code></pre></div></div><div data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div>
<span data-as="p"><strong>Plugin MCP features</strong>:</span>
<ul>
<li><strong>Automatic lifecycle</strong>: Servers start when plugin enables, but you must restart Claude Code to apply MCP server changes (enabling or disabling)</li>
<li><strong>Environment variables</strong>: Use <code>${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}</code> for plugin-relative paths</li>
<li><strong>User environment access</strong>: Access to same environment variables as manually configured servers</li>
<li><strong>Multiple transport types</strong>: Support stdio, SSE, and HTTP transports (transport support may vary by server)</li>
</ul>
<span data-as="p"><strong>Viewing plugin MCP servers</strong>:</span>
<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent" numberOfLines="2" language="shellscript"><div data-floating-buttons="true" class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5"><div class="z-10 relative select-none"><button text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60"><path d="M12 16h.01"></path><path d="M12 8v4"></path><path d="M15.312 2a2 2 0 0 1 1.414.586l4.688 4.688A2 2 0 0 1 22 8.688v6.624a2 2 0 0 1-.586 1.414l-4.688 4.688a2 2 0 0 1-1.414.586H8.688a2 2 0 0 1-1.414-.586l-4.688-4.688A2 2 0 0 1 2 15.312V8.688a2 2 0 0 1 .586-1.414l4.688-4.688A2 2 0 0 1 8.688 2z"></path></svg></button><div aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -top-3 left-1/2 transform whitespace-nowrap -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 peer-hover:opacity-100 opacity-0 text-tooltip-foreground rounded-lg px-1.5 py-0.5 text-xs bg-primary-dark">Report incorrect code</div></div><div class="z-10 relative [&amp;_*]:outline-0 [&amp;_*]:focus:ring-0 [&amp;_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25" data-component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0" style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E"><div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6"><pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light-default dark-plus" style="background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E;color:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4" language="shellscript"><code language="shellscript" numberOfLines="2"><span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Within Claude Code, see all MCP servers including plugin ones</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">/mcp</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div><div data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div>
<span data-as="p">Plugin servers appear in the list with indicators showing they come from plugins.</span>
<span data-as="p"><strong>Benefits of plugin MCP servers</strong>:</span>
<ul>
<li><strong>Bundled distribution</strong>: Tools and servers packaged together</li>
<li><strong>Automatic setup</strong>: No manual MCP configuration needed</li>
<li><strong>Team consistency</strong>: Everyone gets the same tools when plugin is installed</li>
</ul>
<span data-as="p">See the <a class="link" href="/docs/en/plugins-reference#mcp-servers">plugin components reference</a> for details on bundling MCP servers with plugins.</span>
<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="mcp-installation-scopes"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#mcp-installation-scopes" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">MCP installation scopes</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">MCP servers can be configured at three different scope levels, each serving distinct purposes for managing server accessibility and sharing. Understanding these scopes helps you determine the best way to configure servers for your specific needs.</span>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="local-scope"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#local-scope" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Local scope</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">Local-scoped servers represent the default configuration level and are stored in <code>~/.claude.json</code> under your project’s path. These servers remain private to you and are only accessible when working within the current project directory. This scope is ideal for personal development servers, experimental configurations, or servers containing sensitive credentials that shouldn’t be shared.</span>
<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20" data-callout-type="note"><div class="mt-0.5 w-4" data-component-part="callout-icon"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" aria-label="Note"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M7 1.3C10.14 1.3 12.7 3.86 12.7 7C12.7 10.14 10.14 12.7 7 12.7C5.48908 12.6974 4.0408 12.096 2.97241 11.0276C1.90403 9.9592 1.30264 8.51092 1.3 7C1.3 3.86 3.86 1.3 7 1.3ZM7 0C3.14 0 0 3.14 0 7C0 10.86 3.14 14 7 14C10.86 14 14 10.86 14 7C14 3.14 10.86 0 7 0ZM8 3H6V8H8V3ZM8 9H6V11H8V9Z"></path></svg></div><div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&amp;_code]:!text-current [&amp;_kbd]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:border-current [&amp;_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" data-component-part="callout-content"><span data-as="p">The term “local scope” for MCP servers differs from general local settings. MCP local-scoped servers are stored in <code>~/.claude.json</code> (your home directory), while general local settings use <code>.claude/settings.local.json</code> (in the project directory). See <a class="link" href="/docs/en/settings#settings-files">Settings</a> for details on settings file locations.</span></div></div>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">claude</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> mcp</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> add</span><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6"> --transport</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> http</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> stripe</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> https://mcp.stripe.com</span></span>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Explicitly specify local scope</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">claude</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> mcp</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> add</span><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6"> --transport</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> http</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> stripe</span><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6"> --scope</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> local</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> https://mcp.stripe.com</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div><div data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="project-scope"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#project-scope" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Project scope</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">Project-scoped servers enable team collaboration by storing configurations in a <code>.mcp.json</code> file at your project’s root directory. This file is designed to be checked into version control, ensuring all team members have access to the same MCP tools and services. When you add a project-scoped server, Claude Code automatically creates or updates this file with the appropriate configuration structure.</span>
<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent" numberOfLines="2" language="shellscript"><div data-floating-buttons="true" class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5"><div class="z-10 relative select-none"><button class="h-[26px] w-[26px] flex items-center justify-center rounded-md backdrop-blur peer group/code-snippet-feedback-button" id="code-snippet-feedback-button" aria-label="Report incorrect code"><svg text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60"><path d="M12 16h.01"></path><path d="M12 8v4"></path><path d="M15.312 2a2 2 0 0 1 1.414.586l4.688 4.688A2 2 0 0 1 22 8.688v6.624a2 2 0 0 1-.586 1.414l-4.688 4.688a2 2 0 0 1-1.414.586H8.688a2 2 0 0 1-1.414-.586l-4.688-4.688A2 2 0 0 1 2 -translate-y-1/2 peer-hover:opacity-100 opacity-0 text-tooltip-foreground rounded-lg px-1.5 py-0.5 text-xs bg-primary-dark">Report incorrect code</div></div><div class="z-10 relative select-none"><button class="h-[26px] w-[26px] flex items-center justify-center rounded-md backdrop-blur peer group/copy-button " data-testid="copy-code-button" aria-label="Copy the contents from the code block"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 <span data-as="p">The resulting <code>.mcp.json</code> file follows a standardized format:</span>

</code></pre></div></div><div data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div>
<span data-as="p">For security reasons, Claude Code prompts for approval before using project-scoped servers from <code>.mcp.json</code> files. If you need to reset these approval choices, use the <code>claude mcp reset-project-choices</code> command.</span>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="user-scope"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#user-scope" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">User scope</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">User-scoped servers are stored in <code>~/.claude.json</code> and provide cross-project accessibility, making them available across all projects on your machine while remaining private to your user account. This scope works well for personal utility servers, development tools, or services you frequently use across different projects.</span>
<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Add a user server</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">claude</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> mcp</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> add</span><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6"> --transport</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> http</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> hubspot</span><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6"> --scope</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> user</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> https://mcp.hubspot.com/anthropic</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div><div data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="choosing-the-right-scope"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#choosing-the-right-scope" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Choosing the right scope</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">Select your scope based on:</span>
<ul>
<li><strong>Local scope</strong>: Personal servers, experimental configurations, or sensitive credentials specific to one project</li>
<li><strong>Project scope</strong>: Team-shared servers, project-specific tools, or services required for collaboration</li>
<li><strong>User scope</strong>: Personal utilities needed across multiple projects, development tools, or frequently used services</li>
</ul>
<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20" data-callout-type="note"><div class="mt-0.5 w-4" data-component-part="callout-icon"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" aria-label="Note"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M7 1.3C10.14 1.3 12.7 3.86 12.7 7C12.7 10.14 10.14 12.7 7 12.7C5.48908 12.6974 4.0408 12.096 2.97241 11.0276C1.90403 9.9592 1.30264 8.51092 1.3 7C1.3 3.86 3.86 1.3 7 1.3ZM7 0C3.14 0 0 3.14 0 7C0 10.86 3.14 14 7 14C10.86 14 14 10.86 14 7C14 3.14 10.86 0 7 0ZM8 3H6V8H8V3ZM8 9H6V11H8V9Z"></path></svg></div><div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&amp;_code]:!text-current [&amp;_kbd]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:border-current [&amp;_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" data-component-part="callout-content"><span data-as="p"><strong>Where are MCP servers stored?</strong></span><ul>
<li><strong>User and local scope</strong>: <code>~/.claude.json</code> (in the <code>mcpServers</code> field or under project paths)</li>
<li><strong>Project scope</strong>: <code>.mcp.json</code> in your project root (checked into source control)</li>
<li><strong>Managed</strong>: <code>managed-mcp.json</code> in system directories (see <a href="#managed-mcp-configuration" class="link">Managed MCP configuration</a>)</li>
</ul></div></div>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="scope-hierarchy-and-precedence"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#scope-hierarchy-and-precedence" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Scope hierarchy and precedence</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">MCP server configurations follow a clear precedence hierarchy. When servers with the same name exist at multiple scopes, the system resolves conflicts by prioritizing local-scoped servers first, followed by project-scoped servers, and finally user-scoped servers. This design ensures that personal configurations can override shared ones when needed.</span>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="environment-variable-expansion-in-mcp-json"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#environment-variable-expansion-in-mcp-json" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Environment variable expansion in <code>.mcp.json</code></span></h3>
<span data-as="p">Claude Code supports environment variable expansion in <code>.mcp.json</code> files, allowing teams to share configurations while maintaining flexibility for machine-specific paths and sensitive values like API keys.</span>
<span data-as="p"><strong>Supported syntax:</strong></span>
<ul>
<li><code>${VAR}</code> - Expands to the value of environment variable <code>VAR</code></li>
<li><code>${VAR:-default}</code> - Expands to <code>VAR</code> if set, otherwise uses <code>default</code></li>
</ul>
<span data-as="p"><strong>Expansion locations:</strong>
Environment variables can be expanded in:</span>
<ul>
<li><code>command</code> - The server executable path</li>
<li><code>args</code> - Command-line arguments</li>
<li><code>env</code> - Environment variables passed to the server</li>
<li><code>url</code> - For HTTP server types</li>
<li><code>headers</code> - For HTTP server authentication</li>
</ul>
<span data-as="p"><strong>Example with variable expansion:</strong></span>
<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent" numberOfLines="11" language="json"><div data-floating-buttons="true" class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5"><div class="z-10 relative select-none"><button <span class="line"><span style="color:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">  &quot;mcpServers&quot;</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">: {</span></span>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">      &quot;headers&quot;</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">: {</span></span>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">      }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">    }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">  }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">}</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div><div data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div>
<span data-as="p">If a required environment variable is not set and has no default value, Claude Code will fail to parse the config.</span>
<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="practical-examples"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#practical-examples" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Practical examples</span></h2>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="example-monitor-errors-with-sentry"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#example-monitor-errors-with-sentry" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Example: Monitor errors with Sentry</span></h3>

style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E"><div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6"><pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light-default dark-plus" style="background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E;color:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4" language="shellscript"><code language="shellscript" numberOfLines="10"><span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># 1. Add the Sentry MCP server</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">claude</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> mcp</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> add</span><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#569CD6"> --transport</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> http</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> sentry</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> https://mcp.sentry.dev/mcp</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># 2. Use /mcp to authenticate with your Sentry account</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">&gt;</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4"> /mcp</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># 3. Debug production issues</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">&gt;</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;What are the most common errors in the last 24 hours?&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">&gt;</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;Show me the stack trace for error ID abc123&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">&gt;</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &quot;Which deployment introduced these new errors?&quot;</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div><div data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># 2. Query your database naturally</span></span>

<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="authenticate-with-remote-mcp-servers"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#authenticate-with-remote-mcp-servers" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Authenticate with remote MCP servers</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">Many cloud-based MCP servers require authentication. Claude Code supports OAuth 2.0 for secure connections.</span>
<div role="list" class="steps ml-3.5 mt-10 mb-6"><div id="" role="listitem" class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"><div data-component-part="step-line" class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10" contentEditable="false"></div><div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" data-component-part="step-number" contentEditable="false"><div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center"><div class="">1</div><div class="absolute" data-component-part="step-number-anchor-link"><a href="#" class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0" aria-label="Navigate to header"><div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 <div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-green-200 bg-green-50 dark:border-green-900 dark:bg-green-600/20 3.12175 10.4698 3.12261 10.4771H7.50342C7.50427 10.4698 7.50598 10.463 7.50684 10.4557C7.77688 9.54727 8.48281 8.47011 8.93484 7.95492C9.67728 7.13181 10.1258 6.02703 10.1258 4.78826C10.1258 2.15486 dark:[&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&amp;_code]:!text-current [&amp;_kbd]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:border-current [&amp;_strong]:!text-current text-green-800 dark:text-green-300" data-component-part="callout-content"><span data-as="p">Tips:</span><ul>
<li>Authentication tokens are stored securely and refreshed automatically</li>
<li>Use “Clear authentication” in the <code>/mcp</code> menu to revoke access</li>
<li>If your browser doesn’t open automatically, copy the provided URL</li>
<li>OAuth authentication works with HTTP servers</li>
</ul></div></div>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="use-pre-configured-oauth-credentials"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#use-pre-configured-oauth-credentials" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Use pre-configured OAuth credentials</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">Some MCP servers don’t support automatic OAuth setup. If you see an error like “Incompatible auth server: does not support dynamic client registration,” the server requires pre-configured credentials. Register an OAuth app through the server’s developer portal first, then provide the credentials when adding the server.</span>
<div role="list" class="steps ml-3.5 mt-10 mb-6"><div id="" role="listitem" class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"><div data-component-part="step-line" class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10" contentEditable="false"></div><div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" data-component-part="step-number" contentEditable="false"><div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center"><div class="">1</div><div class="absolute" data-component-part="step-number-anchor-link"><a href="#" class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0" aria-label="Navigate to header"><div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div></div></div><div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px"><p class="mt-2 font-semibold prose dark:prose-invert text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-200" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="step-title">Register an OAuth app with the server</p><div data-component-part="step-content" class="prose dark:prose-invert"><span data-as="p">Create an app through the server’s developer portal and note your client ID and client secret.</span><span data-as="p">Many servers also require a redirect URI. If so, choose a port and register a redirect URI in the format <code>http://localhost:PORT/callback</code>. Use that same port with <code>--callback-port</code> in the next step.</span></div></div></div><div id="" role="listitem" class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"><div data-component-part="step-line" class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10" contentEditable="false"></div><div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" data-component-part="step-number" contentEditable="false"><div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center"><div class="">2</div><div class="absolute" data-component-part="step-number-anchor-link"><a href="#" class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0" aria-label="Navigate to header"><div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div></div></div><div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px"><p class="mt-2 font-semibold prose dark:prose-invert text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-200" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="step-title">Add the server with your credentials</p><div data-component-part="step-content" class="prose dark:prose-invert"><span data-as="p">Choose one of the following methods. dark:[&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&amp;_code]:!text-current [&amp;_kbd]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:border-current [&amp;_strong]:!text-current text-green-800 dark:text-green-300" data-component-part="callout-content"><span data-as="p">Tips:</span><ul>
<li>The client secret is stored securely in your system keychain (macOS) or a credentials file, not in your config</li>
<li>If the server uses a public OAuth client with no secret, use only <code>--client-id</code> without <code>--client-secret</code></li>
<li>These flags only apply to HTTP and SSE transports. They have no effect on stdio servers</li>
<li>Use <code>claude mcp get &lt;name&gt;</code> to verify that OAuth credentials are configured for a server</li>
</ul></div></div>
<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="add-mcp-servers-from-json-configuration"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#add-mcp-servers-from-json-configuration" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Add MCP servers from JSON configuration</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">If you have a JSON configuration for an MCP server, you can add it directly:</span>
