style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Basic syntax</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">claude</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> mcp</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> add-json</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4"> &lt;</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">nam</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">e</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">&gt;</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &#x27;&lt;json&gt;&#x27;</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Example: Adding an HTTP server with JSON configuration</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">claude</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> mcp</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> add-json</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> weather-api</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &#x27;{&quot;type&quot;:&quot;http&quot;,&quot;url&quot;:&quot;https://api.weather.com/mcp&quot;,&quot;headers&quot;:{&quot;Authorization&quot;:&quot;Bearer token&quot;}}&#x27;</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Example: Adding a stdio server with JSON configuration</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">claude</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> mcp</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> add-json</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> local-weather</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178"> &#x27;{&quot;type&quot;:&quot;stdio&quot;,&quot;command&quot;:&quot;/path/to/weather-cli&quot;,&quot;args&quot;:[&quot;--api-key&quot;,&quot;abc123&quot;],&quot;env&quot;:{&quot;CACHE_DIR&quot;:&quot;/tmp&quot;}}&#x27;</span></span>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Example: Adding an HTTP server with pre-configured OAuth credentials</span></span>

dark:text-green-300" data-component-part="callout-content"><span data-as="p">Tips:</span><ul>
<li>This feature only works on macOS and Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL)</li>
<li>It reads the Claude Desktop configuration file from its standard location on those platforms</li>
<li>Use the <code>--scope user</code> flag to add servers to your user configuration</li>
<li>Imported servers will have the same names as in Claude Desktop</li>
<li>If servers with the same names already exist, they will get a numerical suffix (for example, <code>server_1</code>)</li>
</ul></div></div>
<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="use-mcp-servers-from-claude-ai"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#use-mcp-servers-from-claude-ai" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Use MCP servers from Claude.ai</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">If you’ve logged into Claude Code with a <a href="https://claude.ai" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" class="link">Claude.ai</a> account, MCP servers you’ve added in Claude.ai are automatically available in Claude Code:</span>
<div role="list" class="steps ml-3.5 mt-10 mb-6"><div id="" role="listitem" class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"><div data-component-part="step-line" class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10" contentEditable="false"></div><div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" data-component-part="step-number" contentEditable="false"><div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center"><div class="">1</div><div class="absolute" data-component-part="step-number-anchor-link"><a href="#" class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0" aria-label="Navigate to header"><div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div></div></div><div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px"><p class="mt-2 font-semibold prose dark:prose-invert text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-200" contentEditable="false" data-component-part="step-title">Configure MCP servers in Claude.ai</p><div data-component-part="step-content" class="prose dark:prose-invert"><span data-as="p">Add servers at <a href="https://claude.ai/settings/connectors" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" class="link">claude.ai/settings/connectors</a>. On Team and Enterprise plans, only admins can add servers.</span></div></div></div><div id="" role="listitem" class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"><div <h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="mcp-output-limits-and-warnings"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#mcp-output-limits-and-warnings" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">MCP output limits and warnings</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">When MCP tools produce large outputs, Claude Code helps manage the token usage to prevent overwhelming your conversation context:</span>
<ul>
<li><strong>Output warning threshold</strong>: Claude Code displays a warning when any MCP tool output exceeds 10,000 tokens</li>
<li><strong>Configurable limit</strong>: You can adjust the maximum allowed MCP output tokens using the <code>MAX_MCP_OUTPUT_TOKENS</code> environment variable</li>
<li><strong>Default limit</strong>: The default maximum is 25,000 tokens</li>
</ul>
<span data-as="p">To increase the limit for tools that produce large outputs:</span>
<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></button><div aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -top-3 left-1/2 transform whitespace-nowrap -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 peer-hover:opacity-100 opacity-0 text-tooltip-foreground rounded-lg px-1.5 py-0.5 text-xs bg-primary-dark">Ask AI</div></div></div><div class="w-0 min-w-full max-w-full py-3.5 px-4 h-full dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&amp;_*]:ring-0 [&amp;_*]:outline-0 [&amp;_*]:focus:ring-0 [&amp;_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25" data-component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0" style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E"><div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6"><pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light-default dark-plus" style="background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E;color:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4" language="shellscript"><code language="shellscript" numberOfLines="3"><span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Set a higher limit for MCP tool outputs</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#569CD6">export</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE"> MAX_MCP_OUTPUT_TOKENS</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">=</span><span style="color:#0550AE;--shiki-dark:#B5CEA8">50000</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA">claude</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div><div data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div>
<span data-as="p">This is particularly useful when working with MCP servers that:</span>
<ul>
<li>Query large datasets or databases</li>
<li>Generate detailed reports or documentation</li>
<li>Process extensive log files or debugging information</li>
</ul>
<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50 dark:border-yellow-900 dark:bg-yellow-600/20 [&amp;_[data-component-part=&#x27;callout-icon&#x27;]]:mt-px" data-callout-type="warning"><div class="mt-0.5 w-4" data-component-part="callout-icon"><svg class="flex-none size-5 text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-label="Warning"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 9v2m0 4h.01m-6.938 4h13.856c1.54 0 2.502-1.667 1.732-3L13.732 4c-.77-1.333-2.694-1.333-3.464 0L3.34 16c-.77 1.333.192 3 1.732 3z"></path></svg></div><div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&amp;_code]:!text-current [&amp;_kbd]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:border-current [&amp;_strong]:!text-current text-yellow-800 dark:text-yellow-300" data-component-part="callout-content"><span data-as="p">If you frequently encounter output warnings with specific MCP servers, consider increasing the limit or configuring the server to paginate or filter its responses.</span></div></div>
<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="use-mcp-resources"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#use-mcp-resources" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Use MCP resources</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">MCP servers can expose resources that you can reference using @ mentions, similar to how you reference files.</span>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="reference-mcp-resources"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#reference-mcp-resources" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Reference MCP resources</span></h3>

style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div></div></div></div><div id="" role="listitem" class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"><div data-component-part="step-line" class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-transparent bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-200 dark:from-white/10 via-80% to-transparent group-has-[[data-component-part=&quot;step-content&quot;]:empty]/step:hidden" contentEditable="false"></div><div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" data-component-part="step-number" code-block-background [&amp;_*]:ring-0 [&amp;_*]:outline-0 [&amp;_*]:focus:ring-0 [&amp;_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded data-component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0" style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E"><div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6"><pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light-default dark-plus" style="background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E;color:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4" language="text"><code language="text" numberOfLines="2"><span class="line"><span>&gt; Compare @postgres:schema://users with @docs:file://database/user-model</span></span>
<span class="line"><span></span></span></code></pre></div></div><div data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div></div></div></div></div>
<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-green-200 bg-green-50 dark:border-green-900 dark:bg-green-600/20 [&amp;_[data-component-part=&#x27;callout-icon&#x27;]]:mt-px" data-callout-type="tip"><div class="mt-0.5 w-4" data-component-part="callout-icon"><svg width="11" height="14" viewBox="0 0 11 14" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="text-green-800 dark:text-green-300 w-3.5 h-auto" aria-label="Tip"><path d="M3.12794 12.4232C3.12794 12.5954 3.1776 12.7634 3.27244 11.3513H3.12521L3.12794 12.4232ZM5.31288 0C2.52414 0.00875889 0.5 2.26889 0.5 4.78826C0.5 6.00188 0.949566 7.10829 1.69119 7.95492C2.14321 8.47011 2.84901 9.54727 3.11919 10.4557C3.12005 10.4625 3.12175 10.4698 3.12261 10.4771H7.50342C7.50427 10.4698 7.50598 10.463 7.50684 10.4557C7.77688 9.54727 8.48281 8.47011 8.93484 7.95492C9.67728 7.13181 10.1258 6.02703 10.1258 4.78826C10.1258 2.15486 4.78826C1.8126 3.09829 3.12794 1.31944 5.28827 1.3126C7.2435 1.3126 8.81315 2.88226 8.81315 4.78826C8.81315 5.63599 8.50688 6.47551 7.94902 7.11267ZM4.87534 2.18767C3.66939 2.18767 2.68767 3.16939 2.68767 4.37534C2.68767 4.61719 2.88336 4.81288 3.12521 4.81288C3.36705 4.81288 3.56274 4.61599 3.56274 4.37534C3.56274 3.6515 4.1515 3.06274 4.87534 3.06274C5.11719 3.06274 5.31288 2.86727 5.31288 2.62548C5.31288 2.38369 5.11599 2.18767 4.87534 2.18767Z"></path></svg></div><div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&amp;_code]:!text-current [&amp;_kbd]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:border-current [&amp;_strong]:!text-current text-green-800 dark:text-green-300" data-component-part="callout-content"><span data-as="p">Tips:</span><ul>
<li>Resources are automatically fetched and included as attachments when referenced</li>
<li>Resource paths are fuzzy-searchable in the @ mention autocomplete</li>
<li>Claude Code automatically provides tools to list and read MCP resources when servers support them</li>
<li>Resources can contain any type of content that the MCP server provides (text, JSON, structured data, etc.)</li>
</ul></div></div>
<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="scale-with-mcp-tool-search"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#scale-with-mcp-tool-search" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Scale with MCP Tool Search</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">When you have many MCP servers configured, tool definitions can consume a significant portion of your context window. MCP Tool Search solves this by dynamically loading tools on-demand instead of preloading all of them.</span>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="how-it-works"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#how-it-works" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">How it works</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">Claude Code automatically enables Tool Search when your MCP tool descriptions would consume more than 10% of the context window. You can <a href="#configure-tool-search" class="link">adjust this threshold</a> or disable tool search entirely. When triggered:</span>
<ol>
<li>MCP tools are deferred rather than loaded into context upfront</li>
<li>Claude uses a search tool to discover relevant MCP tools when needed</li>
<li>Only the tools Claude actually needs are loaded into context</li>
<li>MCP tools continue to work exactly as before from your perspective</li>
</ol>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="for-mcp-server-authors"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#for-mcp-server-authors" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">For MCP server authors</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">If you’re building an MCP server, the server instructions field becomes more useful with Tool Search enabled. Server instructions help Claude understand when to search for your tools, similar to how <a class="link" href="/docs/en/skills">skills</a> work.</span>
<span data-as="p">Add clear, descriptive server instructions that explain:</span>
<ul>
<li>What category of tasks your tools handle</li>
<li>When Claude should search for your tools</li>
<li>Key capabilities your server provides</li>
</ul>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="configure-tool-search"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#configure-tool-search" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Configure tool search</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">Tool search runs in auto mode by default, meaning it activates only when your MCP tool definitions exceed the context threshold. If you have few tools, they load normally without tool search. This feature requires models that support <code>tool_reference</code> blocks: Sonnet 4 and later, or Opus 4 and later. Haiku models do not support tool search.</span>
<span data-as="p">Control tool search behavior with the <code>ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH</code> environment variable:</span>
<div data-table-wrapper="true" class="[--page-padding:20px] overflow-x-auto flex w-[calc(100%+(var(--page-padding)*2))] my-[1em] py-[1em] -mx-[var(--page-padding)] max-w-none [contain:inline-size]"><div class="px-[var(--page-padding)] grow max-w-none table"><table class="m-0 min-w-full w-full max-w-none table [&amp;_td]:min-w-[150px] [&amp;_th]:text-left [&amp;_td[data-numeric]]:tabular-nums"><thead><tr><th style="text-align:left">Value</th><th style="text-align:left">Behavior</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td style="text-align:left"><code>auto</code></td><td style="text-align:left">Activates when MCP tools exceed 10% of context (default)</td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:left"><code>auto:&lt;N&gt;</code></td><td style="text-align:left">Activates at custom threshold, where <code>&lt;N&gt;</code> is a percentage (e.g., <code>auto:5</code> for 5%)</td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:left"><code>true</code></td><td style="text-align:left">Always enabled</td></tr><tr><td style="text-align:left"><code>false</code></td><td style="text-align:left">Disabled, all MCP tools loaded upfront</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div>
<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent" numberOfLines="5" language="shellscript"><div data-floating-buttons="true" class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5"><div class="z-10 relative select-none"><button class="h-[26px] w-[26px] flex items-center justify-center rounded-md backdrop-blur peer group/code-snippet-feedback-button" id="code-snippet-feedback-button" aria-label="Report incorrect code"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60"><path d="M12 16h.01"></path><path d="M12 8v4"></path><path d="M15.312 2a2 2 0 0 1 1.414.586l4.688 4.688A2 2 0 0 1 22 8.688v6.624a2 2 0 0 1-.586 1.414l-4.688 4.688a2 2 0 0 1-1.414.586H8.688a2 2 0 0 1-1.414-.586l-4.688-4.688A2 2 0 0 1 2 15.312V8.688a2 2 0 0 1 .586-1.414l4.688-4.688A2 2 0 0 1 8.688 2z"></path></svg></button><div aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -top-3 left-1/2 transform whitespace-nowrap -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 peer-hover:opacity-100 opacity-0 text-tooltip-foreground rounded-lg px-1.5 py-0.5 text-xs bg-primary-dark">Report incorrect code</div></div><div class="z-10 relative select-none"><button class="h-[26px] w-[26px] flex items-center justify-center rounded-md backdrop-blur peer group/copy-button " data-testid="copy-code-button" aria-label="Copy the contents from the code block"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/copy-button:text-white/60"><path d="M14.25 5.25H7.25C6.14543 5.25 5.25 6.14543 5.25 7.25V14.25C5.25 15.3546 6.14543 16.25 7.25 16.25H14.25C15.3546 16.25 16.25 15.3546 16.25 <span class="line"><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">=</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">auto:5</span><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA"> claude</span></span>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#6E7781;--shiki-dark:#6A9955"># Disable tool search entirely</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH</span><span style="color:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">=</span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">false</span><span style="color:#953800;--shiki-dark:#DCDCAA"> claude</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div><div data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div>
<span data-as="p">Or set the value in your <a class="link" href="/docs/en/settings#available-settings">settings.json <code>env</code> field</a>.</span>
<span data-as="p">You can also disable the MCPSearch tool specifically using the <code>disallowedTools</code> setting:</span>

<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="use-mcp-prompts-as-commands"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#use-mcp-prompts-as-commands" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Use MCP prompts as commands</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">MCP servers can expose prompts that become available as commands in Claude Code.</span>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="execute-mcp-prompts"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#execute-mcp-prompts" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Execute MCP prompts</span></h3>

<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-green-200 bg-green-50 dark:border-green-900 dark:bg-green-600/20 [&amp;_[data-component-part=&#x27;callout-icon&#x27;]]:mt-px" data-callout-type="tip"><div class="mt-0.5 w-4" data-component-part="callout-icon"><svg width="11" height="14" viewBox="0 0 11 14" 3.12175 10.4698 3.12261 10.4771H7.50342C7.50427 10.4698 7.50598 10.463 7.50684 10.4557C7.77688 9.54727 8.48281 8.47011 8.93484 7.95492C9.67728 7.13181 10.1258 6.02703 10.1258 4.78826C10.1258 2.15486 dark:[&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&amp;_code]:!text-current [&amp;_kbd]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:border-current [&amp;_strong]:!text-current text-green-800 dark:text-green-300" data-component-part="callout-content"><span data-as="p">Tips:</span><ul>
<li>MCP prompts are dynamically discovered from connected servers</li>
<li>Arguments are parsed based on the prompt’s defined parameters</li>
<li>Prompt results are injected directly into the conversation</li>
<li>Server and prompt names are normalized (spaces become underscores)</li>
</ul></div></div>
<h2 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="managed-mcp-configuration"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#managed-mcp-configuration" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Managed MCP configuration</span></h2>
<span data-as="p">For organizations that need centralized control over MCP servers, Claude Code supports two configuration options:</span>
<ol>
<li><strong>Exclusive control with <code>managed-mcp.json</code></strong>: Deploy a fixed set of MCP servers that users cannot modify or extend</li>
<li><strong>Policy-based control with allowlists/denylists</strong>: Allow users to add their own servers, but restrict which ones are permitted</li>
</ol>
<span data-as="p">These options allow IT administrators to:</span>
<ul>
<li><strong>Control which MCP servers employees can access</strong>: Deploy a standardized set of approved MCP servers across the organization</li>
<li><strong>Prevent unauthorized MCP servers</strong>: Restrict users from adding unapproved MCP servers</li>
<li><strong>Disable MCP entirely</strong>: Remove MCP functionality completely if needed</li>
</ul>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="option-1-exclusive-control-with-managed-mcp-json"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#option-1-exclusive-control-with-managed-mcp-json" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Option 1: Exclusive control with managed-mcp.json</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">When you deploy a <code>managed-mcp.json</code> file, it takes <strong>exclusive control</strong> over all MCP servers. Users cannot add, modify, or use any MCP servers other than those defined in this file. This is the simplest approach for organizations that want complete control.</span>
<span data-as="p">System administrators deploy the configuration file to a system-wide directory:</span>
<ul>
<li>macOS: <code>/Library/Application Support/ClaudeCode/managed-mcp.json</code></li>
<li>Linux and WSL: <code>/etc/claude-code/managed-mcp.json</code></li>
<li>Windows: <code>C:\Program Files\ClaudeCode\managed-mcp.json</code></li>
</ul>
<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20" data-callout-type="note"><div class="mt-0.5 w-4" data-component-part="callout-icon"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" aria-label="Note"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M7 1.3C10.14 1.3 12.7 3.86 12.7 7C12.7 10.14 10.14 12.7 7 12.7C5.48908 12.6974 4.0408 12.096 2.97241 11.0276C1.90403 9.9592 1.30264 8.51092 1.3 7C1.3 3.86 3.86 1.3 7 1.3ZM7 0C3.14 0 0 3.14 0 7C0 10.86 3.14 14 7 14C10.86 14 14 10.86 14 7C14 3.14 10.86 0 7 0ZM8 3H6V8H8V3ZM8 9H6V11H8V9Z"></path></svg></div><div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&amp;_code]:!text-current [&amp;_kbd]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:border-current [&amp;_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" data-component-part="callout-content"><span data-as="p">These are system-wide paths (not user home directories like <code>~/Library/...</code>) that require administrator privileges. They are designed to be deployed by IT administrators.</span></div></div>
<span data-as="p">The <code>managed-mcp.json</code> file uses the same format as a standard <code>.mcp.json</code> file:</span>
<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent" numberOfLines="20" language="json"><div data-floating-buttons="true" class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5"><div class="z-10 relative select-none"><button 15.312V8.688a2 2 0 0 1 .586-1.414l4.688-4.688A2 2 0 0 1 8.688 2z"></path></svg></button><div aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -top-3 left-1/2 transform whitespace-nowrap -translate-x-1/2 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25" data-component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0" style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E"><div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6"><pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light-default dark-plus" style="background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E;color:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4" language="json"><code language="json" numberOfLines="20"><span class="line"><span <span class="line"><span style="color:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">  &quot;mcpServers&quot;</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">: {</span></span>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">      &quot;url&quot;</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">&quot;https://api.githubcopilot.com/mcp/&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">    },</span></span>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">    },</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">    &quot;company-internal&quot;</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">: {</span></span>

<span class="line"><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">      }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">    }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">  }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">}</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div><div data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div>
<h3 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="option-2-policy-based-control-with-allowlists-and-denylists"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#option-2-policy-based-control-with-allowlists-and-denylists" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Option 2: Policy-based control with allowlists and denylists</span></h3>
<span data-as="p">Instead of taking exclusive control, administrators can allow users to configure their own MCP servers while enforcing restrictions on which servers are permitted. This approach uses <code>allowedMcpServers</code> and <code>deniedMcpServers</code> in the <a class="link" href="/docs/en/settings#settings-files">managed settings file</a>.</span>
<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20" data-callout-type="note"><div class="mt-0.5 w-4" data-component-part="callout-icon"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" aria-label="Note"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M7 1.3C10.14 1.3 12.7 3.86 12.7 7C12.7 10.14 10.14 12.7 7 12.7C5.48908 12.6974 4.0408 12.096 2.97241 11.0276C1.90403 9.9592 1.30264 8.51092 1.3 7C1.3 3.86 3.86 1.3 7 1.3ZM7 0C3.14 0 0 3.14 0 7C0 10.86 3.14 14 7 14C10.86 14 14 10.86 14 7C14 3.14 10.86 0 7 0ZM8 3H6V8H8V3ZM8 9H6V11H8V9Z"></path></svg></div><div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&amp;_code]:!text-current [&amp;_kbd]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:border-current [&amp;_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" data-component-part="callout-content"><span data-as="p"><strong>Choosing between options</strong>: Use Option 1 (<code>managed-mcp.json</code>) when you want to deploy a fixed set of servers with no user customization. Use Option 2 (allowlists/denylists) when you want to allow users to add their own servers within policy constraints.</span></div></div>
<h4 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="restriction-options"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#restriction-options" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Restriction options</span></h4>
<span data-as="p">Each entry in the allowlist or denylist can restrict servers in three ways:</span>
<ol>
<li><strong>By server name</strong> (<code>serverName</code>): Matches the configured name of the server</li>
<li><strong>By command</strong> (<code>serverCommand</code>): Matches the exact command and arguments used to start stdio servers</li>
<li><strong>By URL pattern</strong> (<code>serverUrl</code>): Matches remote server URLs with wildcard support</li>
</ol>
<span data-as="p"><strong>Important</strong>: Each entry must have exactly one of <code>serverName</code>, <code>serverCommand</code>, or <code>serverUrl</code>.</span>
<h4 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="example-configuration"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#example-configuration" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Example configuration</span></h4>
<div class="code-block mt-5 mb-8 not-prose rounded-2xl relative group text-gray-950 dark:text-gray-50 codeblock-light border border-gray-950/10 dark:border-white/10 dark:twoslash-dark bg-transparent dark:bg-transparent" numberOfLines="25" language="json"><div data-floating-buttons="true" class="absolute top-3 right-4 flex items-center gap-1.5"><div class="z-10 relative select-none"><button class="h-[26px] w-[26px] flex items-center justify-center rounded-md backdrop-blur peer group/code-snippet-feedback-button" id="code-snippet-feedback-button" aria-label="Report incorrect code"><svg text-gray-400 group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 dark:group-hover/code-snippet-feedback-button:text-white/60"><path d="M12 16h.01"></path><path d="M12 code block"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 group-hover/copy-button:text-gray-500 dark:text-white/40 14.25V7.25C16.25 6.14543 15.3546 5.25 14.25 5.25Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M2.80103 11.998L1.77203 5.07397C1.61003 stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></button><div aria-hidden="true" class="absolute -top-3 left-1/2 transform whitespace-nowrap -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 peer-hover:opacity-100 opacity-0 text-tooltip-foreground rounded-lg px-1.5 py-0.5 text-xs bg-primary-dark">Copy</div></div><div class="z-10 relative select-none"><button class="h-[26px] w-[26px] flex items-center justify-center <h4 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="how-command-based-restrictions-work"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#how-command-based-restrictions-work" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">How command-based restrictions work</span></h4>
<span data-as="p"><strong>Exact matching</strong>:</span>
<ul>
<li>Command arrays must match <strong>exactly</strong> - both the command and all arguments in the correct order</li>
<li>Example: <code>[&quot;npx&quot;, &quot;-y&quot;, &quot;server&quot;]</code> will NOT match <code>[&quot;npx&quot;, &quot;server&quot;]</code> or <code>[&quot;npx&quot;, &quot;-y&quot;, &quot;server&quot;, &quot;--flag&quot;]</code></li>
</ul>
<span data-as="p"><strong>Stdio server behavior</strong>:</span>
<ul>
<li>When the allowlist contains <strong>any</strong> <code>serverCommand</code> entries, stdio servers <strong>must</strong> match one of those commands</li>
<li>Stdio servers cannot pass by name alone when command restrictions are present</li>
<li>This ensures administrators can enforce which commands are allowed to run</li>
</ul>
<span data-as="p"><strong>Non-stdio server behavior</strong>:</span>
<ul>
<li>Remote servers (HTTP, SSE, WebSocket) use URL-based matching when <code>serverUrl</code> entries exist in the allowlist</li>
<li>If no URL entries exist, remote servers fall back to name-based matching</li>
<li>Command restrictions do not apply to remote servers</li>
</ul>
<h4 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="how-url-based-restrictions-work"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#how-url-based-restrictions-work" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">How URL-based restrictions work</span></h4>
<span data-as="p">URL patterns support wildcards using <code>*</code> to match any sequence of characters. This is useful for allowing entire domains or subdomains.</span>
<span data-as="p"><strong>Wildcard examples</strong>:</span>
<ul>
<li><code>https://mcp.company.com/*</code> - Allow all paths on a specific domain</li>
<li><code>https://*.example.com/*</code> - Allow any subdomain of example.com</li>
<li><code>http://localhost:*/*</code> - Allow any port on localhost</li>
</ul>
<span data-as="p"><strong>Remote server behavior</strong>:</span>
<ul>
<li>When the allowlist contains <strong>any</strong> <code>serverUrl</code> entries, remote servers <strong>must</strong> match one of those URL patterns</li>
<li>Remote servers cannot pass by name alone when URL restrictions are present</li>
<li>This ensures administrators can enforce which remote endpoints are allowed</li>
</ul>

<li>HTTP server at <code>https://mcp.company.com/api</code>: ✅ Allowed (matches URL pattern)</li>
<li>HTTP server at <code>https://api.internal.corp/mcp</code>: ✅ Allowed (matches wildcard subdomain)</li>
<li>HTTP server at <code>https://external.com/mcp</code>: ❌ Blocked (doesn’t match any URL pattern)</li>
<li>Stdio server with any command: ❌ Blocked (no name or command entries to match)</li>
</ul></div></details>

dark:bg-codeblock relative text-sm leading-6 children:!my-0 children:!shadow-none children:!bg-transparent transition-[height] duration-300 ease-in-out code-block-background [&amp;_*]:ring-0 [&amp;_*]:outline-0 [&amp;_*]:focus:ring-0 [&amp;_*]:focus:outline-0 rounded-2xl bg-white overflow-x-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-rounded scrollbar-thumb-black/15 hover:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 active:scrollbar-thumb-black/20 dark:scrollbar-thumb-white/20 dark:hover:scrollbar-thumb-white/25 dark:active:scrollbar-thumb-white/25" data-component-part="code-block-root" tabindex="0" style="font-variant-ligatures:none;height:auto;background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E"><div class="font-mono whitespace-pre leading-6"><pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light-default dark-plus" style="background-color:#ffffff;--shiki-dark-bg:#0B0C0E;color:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4" language="json"><code language="json" numberOfLines="6"><span class="line"><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">{</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">  &quot;allowedMcpServers&quot;</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">: [</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">    { </span><span style="color:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">&quot;serverName&quot;</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">&quot;github&quot;</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4"> },</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">    { </span><span style="color:#116329;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">&quot;serverName&quot;</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">&quot;internal-tool&quot;</span><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4"> }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">  ]</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#D4D4D4">}</span></span>
</code></pre></div></div><div data-fade-overlay="true" aria-hidden="true" style="--fade-color-light:#ffffff;--fade-color-dark:#0B0C0E"></div></div><span data-as="p"><strong>Result</strong>:</span><ul>
<li>Stdio server named “github” with any command: ✅ Allowed (no command restrictions)</li>
<li>Stdio server named “internal-tool” with any command: ✅ Allowed (no command restrictions)</li>
<li>HTTP server named “github”: ✅ Allowed (matches name)</li>
<li>Any server named “other”: ❌ Blocked (name doesn’t match)</li>
</ul></div></details>
<h4 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="allowlist-behavior-allowedmcpservers"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#allowlist-behavior-allowedmcpservers" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Allowlist behavior (<code>allowedMcpServers</code>)</span></h4>
<ul>
<li><code>undefined</code> (default): No restrictions - users can configure any MCP server</li>
<li>Empty array <code>[]</code>: Complete lockdown - users cannot configure any MCP servers</li>
<li>List of entries: Users can only configure servers that match by name, command, or URL pattern</li>
</ul>
<h4 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="denylist-behavior-deniedmcpservers"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#denylist-behavior-deniedmcpservers" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Denylist behavior (<code>deniedMcpServers</code>)</span></h4>
<ul>
<li><code>undefined</code> (default): No servers are blocked</li>
<li>Empty array <code>[]</code>: No servers are blocked</li>
<li>List of entries: Specified servers are explicitly blocked across all scopes</li>
</ul>
<h4 class="flex whitespace-pre-wrap group font-semibold" id="important-notes"><div class="absolute" tabindex="-1"><a href="#important-notes" class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link" aria-label="Navigate to header">​<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="gray" height="12px" viewBox="0 0 576 512"><path d="M0 256C0 167.6 71.6 96 160 96h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C98.1 144 48 194.1 48 256s50.1 112 112 112h72c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H160C71.6 416 0 344.4 0 256zm576 0c0 88.4-71.6 160-160 160H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c61.9 0 112-50.1 112-112s-50.1-112-112-112H344c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24h72c88.4 0 160 71.6 160 160zM184 232H392c13.3 0 24 10.7 24 24s-10.7 24-24 24H184c-13.3 0-24-10.7-24-24s10.7-24 24-24z"></path></svg></div></a></div><span class="cursor-pointer">Important notes</span></h4>
<ul>
<li><strong>Option 1 and Option 2 can be combined</strong>: If <code>managed-mcp.json</code> exists, it has exclusive control and users cannot add servers. Allowlists/denylists still apply to the managed servers themselves.</li>
<li><strong>Denylist takes absolute precedence</strong>: If a server matches a denylist entry (by name, command, or URL), it will be blocked even if it’s on the allowlist</li>
<li>Name-based, command-based, and URL-based restrictions work together: a server passes if it matches <strong>either</strong> a name entry, a command entry, or a URL pattern (unless blocked by denylist)</li>
</ul>
<div class="callout my-4 px-5 py-4 overflow-hidden rounded-2xl flex gap-3 border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 dark:border-blue-900 dark:bg-blue-600/20" data-callout-type="note"><div class="mt-0.5 w-4" data-component-part="callout-icon"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="size-4 text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" aria-label="Note"><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M7 1.3C10.14 1.3 12.7 3.86 12.7 7C12.7 10.14 10.14 12.7 7 12.7C5.48908 12.6974 4.0408 12.096 2.97241 11.0276C1.90403 9.9592 1.30264 8.51092 1.3 7C1.3 3.86 3.86 1.3 7 1.3ZM7 0C3.14 0 0 3.14 0 7C0 10.86 3.14 14 7 14C10.86 14 14 10.86 14 7C14 3.14 10.86 0 7 0ZM8 3H6V8H8V3ZM8 9H6V11H8V9Z"></path></svg></div><div class="text-sm prose dark:prose-invert min-w-0 w-full [&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-light dark:[&amp;_kbd]:bg-background-dark [&amp;_code]:!text-current [&amp;_kbd]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:!text-current [&amp;_a]:border-current [&amp;_strong]:!text-current text-blue-800 dark:text-blue-300" data-component-part="callout-content"><span data-as="p"><strong>When using <code>managed-mcp.json</code></strong>: Users cannot add MCP servers through <code>claude mcp add</code> or configuration files. process.argv.slice(2);\n\nif (args.includes(\"--help\") || args.includes(\"-h\")) {\n  console.log(\"Usage: node migrate-claude-code-docs.js [options]\");\n  console.log(\"\\nOptions:\");\n  console.log(\"  --help, -h       Show this help message\");\n  console.log(\"  --dry-run        Show what would be copied without actually copying\");\n  console.log(\"\\nThis script copies Claude Code docs from ~/code/docs to this repo\");\n  process.exit(0);\n}\n\nconst DRY_RUN = args.includes(\"--dry-run\");\n\n// Base directories\nconst DOCS_REPO_DIR = path.resolve(process.env.HOME, \"code/docs\");\nconst TARGET_REPO_DIR = __dirname;\n\n// Counters\nlet fileCount = 0;\nlet imageCount = 0;\n\nfunction log(message) {\n  console.log(DRY_RUN ? `[DRY RUN] ${message}` : message);\n}\n\nfunction shouldIgnore(name) {\n  const ignoreList = [\n    \".git\",\n    \".gitignore\",\n    \"node_modules\",\n    \"mint.json\",\n    \"deploy.sh\",\n    \"package.json\",\n    \"package-lock.json\",\n    \"CODEOWNERS\",\n    \"CLAUDE.md\",\n    \"ruff.toml\",\n    \"tox.ini\",\n    \"script.js\",\n    \".DS_Store\",\n    \".pytest_cache\",\n    \"__pycache__\",\n  ];\n\n  return ignoreList.includes(name);\n}\n\n/**\n * Copy Claude Code MDX files from all language directories\n */\nfunction copyClaudeCodeDocs() {\n  log(\"\\n\" + \"=\".repeat(60));\n  log(\"Copying Claude Code documentation files...\");\n  log(\"=\".repeat(60) + \"\\n\");\n\n  // Find all language directories\n  const entries = fs.readdirSync(DOCS_REPO_DIR, { withFileTypes: true });\n  const languageDirs = entries.filter(\n    (entry) =\u003e\n      entry.isDirectory() \u0026\u0026\n      !shouldIgnore(entry.name) \u0026\u0026\n      ![\"images\", \"fonts\", \"logo\", \"translate\", \"snippets\", \"scripts\", \"components\", \"prompt-library\", \"style-guide\"].includes(\n        entry.name,\n      ),\n  );\n\n  for (const langDir of languageDirs) {\n    const langCode = langDir.name;\n    log(`Processing language: ${langCode}`);\n\n    // Copy docs/claude-code directory\n    const docsClaudeCodeSrc = path.join(\n      DOCS_REPO_DIR,\n      langCode,\n      \"docs\",\n      \"claude-code\",\n    );\n    if (fs.existsSync(docsClaudeCodeSrc)) {\n      const docsClaudeCodeDest = path.join(\n        TARGET_REPO_DIR,\n        langCode,\n      );\n\n      if TARGET_REPO_DIR,\n        langCode,\n        \"sdk\",\n      );\n\n      if (!DRY_RUN) {\n        fs.mkdirSync(sdkDest, { recursive: true });\n        execSync(`cp -R \"${sdkSrc}\"/* referencedImages = new Set();\n\n  // Find all MDX files we just copied\n  const findMdxFiles = (dir) =\u003e {\n    const files = [];\n    if (!fs.existsSync(dir)) return files;\n\n    const entries = fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true });\n    for (const entry of entries) {\n      const fullPath = path.join(dir, entry.name);\n      if (entry.isDirectory()) {\n        files.push(...findMdxFiles(fullPath));\n      } else if (entry.name.endsWith(\".mdx\")) {\n        files.push(fullPath);\n      }\n    }\n    return files;\n  };\n\n  const mdxFiles = findMdxFiles(TARGET_REPO_DIR);\n\n  // Scan each MDX file for image references\n  for (const mdxFile of mdxFiles) {\n    try {\n      const content = fs.readFileSync(mdxFile, \"utf8\");\n      // Match /images/filename patterns\n      const imageMatches = content.match(/\\/images\\/[^\\s)\"\\]]+/g);\n      if (imageMatches) {\n        imageMatches.forEach((match) =\u003e {\n          // Remove leading slash and extract just the filename\n          const imagePath = match.replace(/^\\/images\\//, \"\");\n          referencedImages.add(imagePath);\n        });\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(`Error reading ${mdxFile}:`, error.message);\n    }\n  }\n\n  return Array.from(referencedImages);\n}\n\n/**\n * Copy only images referenced by Claude Code docs\n */\nfunction copyImages() {\n  log(\"\\n\" + \"=\".repeat(60));\n  log(\"Copying images...\");\n  log(\"=\".repeat(60) + \"\\n\");\n\n  const imagesSrc = path.join(DOCS_REPO_DIR, \"images\");\n  const imagesDest = path.join(TARGET_REPO_DIR, \"images\");\n\n  if (!fs.existsSync(imagesSrc)) {\n    log(\"No images directory found.\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Find which images are actually referenced\n  const referencedImages = findReferencedImages();\n\n  if (referencedImages.length === 0) {\n    log(\"No images referenced in Claude Code docs.\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  if (!DRY_RUN) {\n    fs.mkdirSync(imagesDest, { recursive: true });\n  }\n\n  imageCount = 0;\n  for (const imagePath of referencedImages) {\n    const srcPath = path.join(imagesSrc, imagePath);\n    const destPath = path.join(imagesDest, imagePath);\n\n    if (fs.existsSync(srcPath)) {\n      if (!DRY_RUN) {\n        fs.copyFileSync(srcPath, destPath);\n      }\n      imageCount++;\n      log(`  ✓ Copied ${imagePath}`);\n    } else {\n      log(`  ⚠ Image not found: ${imagePath}`);\n    }\n  }\n\n  log(`\\n✓ Copied ${imageCount} referenced images (out of ${referencedImages.length} found)`);\n}\n\n/**\n * Copy workflows from .github directory\n */\nfunction copyWorkflows() {\n  // Workflows are not migrated - they should be managed separately in this repo\n  log(\"\\n\" + \"=\".repeat(60));\n  log(\"Skipping workflows (managed separately)...\");\n  log(\"=\".repeat(60) + \"\\n\");\n}\n\n/**\n * Copy scripts directory\n */\nfunction copyScripts() {\n  // Scripts are not Generate filtered docs.json with only Claude Code content\n */\nfunction generateDocsJson() {\n  log(\"\\n\" + \"=\".repeat(60));\n  log(\"Generating filtered docs.json...\");\n  log(\"=\".repeat(60) + \"\\n\");\n\n  const docsJsonSrc = path.join(DOCS_REPO_DIR, \"docs.json\");\n  const docsJsonDest = path.join(TARGET_REPO_DIR, \"docs.json\");\n\n  if (!fs.existsSync(docsJsonSrc)) {\n    log(\"Error: docs.json not found in source repo\");\n    return;\n  }\n\n  const docsData = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(docsJsonSrc, \"utf8\"));\n\n  // Filter navigation to only Claude Code content\n  const filteredNavigation = {\n    languages: [],\n  };\n\n  docsData.navigation.languages.forEach((langVersion) =\u003e {\n    const languageCode = langVersion.language;\n\n    // Find Claude Code tab\n    const claudeCodeTab = langVersion.tabs.find((tab) =\u003e tab.tab === \"Claude Code\");\n\n    if (!claudeCodeTab) {\n      log(`  - No Claude Code tab found for language: ${languageCode}`);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    // Find Admin API tab and filter to only Claude Code endpoints\n    let adminApiClaudeCodeGroup = null;\n    const adminApiTab = langVersion.tabs.find((tab) =\u003e tab.tab === \"Admin API\");\n\n    if (adminApiTab) {\n      // Find the Claude Code group within Admin API\n      const findClaudeCodeGroup = (groups) =\u003e {\n        for (const group of groups) {\n          if (group.group === \"Claude Code\") {\n            return group;\n          }\n          if (group.pages) {\n            for (const page of group.pages) {\n              if (typeof page === \"object\" \u0026\u0026 page.group === \"Claude Code\") {\n                return page;\n              }\n            }\n          }\n        }\n        return function updatePaths(obj) {\n    if (typeof obj === 'string') {\n      // Replace /docs/claude-code/ with / for all language codes\n      let updated = updatePaths(value);\n      }\n      return updated;\n    }\n    return obj;\n  }\n\n  // Update all paths in the docs.json to reflect the flattened structure\n  const updatedDocsJson = */\nfunction findReferencedSnippets() {\n  const referencedSnippets = new Set();\n\n  // Find all MDX files we just copied\n  const findMdxFiles = (dir) =\u003e {\n    const files = [];\n    if (!fs.existsSync(dir)) return files;\n\n    const entries = fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true });\n    for (const entry of entries) {\n      const fullPath = path.join(dir, entry.name);\n };\n\n  const mdxFiles = findMdxFiles(TARGET_REPO_DIR);\n\n  // Scan each MDX file for snippet references\n  for (const mdxFile of mdxFiles) {\n    try {\n      const content = error.message);\n    }\n  }\n\n  return Array.from(referencedSnippets);\n}\n\n/**\n * Copy only snippets referenced by Claude Code docs\n */\nfunction copySnippets() {\n  log(\"\\n\" + ✓ Copied ${snippetPath}`);\n    } else {\n      log(`  ⚠ Snippet not found: ${snippetPath}`);\n    }\n  }\n\n  log(`\\n✓ Copied ${snippetCount} referenced snippets (out of ${referencedSnippets.length} found)`);\n}\n\n/**\n * Copy other necessary files (styles, etc.)\n */\nfunction copyOtherFiles() {\n  log(\"\\n\" + \"=\".repeat(60));\n  log(\"Copying other necessary files...\");\n
